solutions.solution: Answer combinations: I+II+III+IV+V or I+(V)+III+IV+V ⇒ answer choice 1 (a)+II+III+IV+V ⇒ answer choice 2 I+II+(c)+IV+V ⇒ answer choice 3 data inadequate ⇒ answer choice 4 not to be selected ⇒ answer choice 5. Note that Sandip Kumarn got 89 in the interview. Devendra Tomar has got more marks than means that Devendra Tomar got 92 marks (fractional marks was not given, so a mark like 89.6 is not possible) or more. Hence, Devendra Tomar and Shanu Khurania fulfill condition V. Also note that it is not mentioned whether Anand Ariwashi, for which Asish Gupta was selected was weekly magazine. Hence the 7 mark. Now, we see that the following should be the answers: Q.31-40: Note: We have named the additional conditions as 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd' and 'e'.
